name: @stackra/logger
purpose: Cross-platform logger — pluggable reporters, enrichers, and formatters, with React bindings and channel switching via Manager.
capabilities: Enrichers for adding context (tenant, user, session)
when_to_use: Any package needs a structured logger with pluggable transports and level filtering.
when_not_to_use: For error reporting to a monitoring service use @stackra/monitoring; for developer console overlays use @stackra/devtools.
